summary: Implemented DinoBrain OS v2 P0 improvements from the review report: honest lexical fallback retrieval mode, optional dense vector cosine retrieval, stopword/high-frequency token filtering, verified os_gate context evidence, sensitive prompt auto-escalation, event-backed memory audit artifact verification, SQLite/wiki index version bumps, v2.0.2 version bump, docs, and regression coverage.
decisions: Bumped DinoBrain to v2.0.2 because retrieval and gate semantics changed materially.
Dense retrieval now reports hybrid_contextual_v2 only when a usable dense vector index/provider exists for the query; otherwise it reports lexical_fallback_v2.
Kept candidate_source labels stable while bumping underlying wiki/sqlite index versions to v3.
os_gate no longer trusts has_context_pack/context_item_count self-report without a verified context pack trace.
audit_memory_use now separates declared artifacts from event-observed artifacts.
next_steps: Commit and push app repo changes when approved.
Publish v2.0.2 release asset if distribution is required.
Review whether dinobrain-data index/task changes should be committed under the existing data-vault policy.
